title: Validate Loss Aversion Pop-up Content and Actions
description: Test the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up for correct dynamic content, button prominence, and action mapping when trying to cancel.
preconditions: User is in an active trial with 6 days remaining.

steps.description: 3. Verify the pop-up headline is 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
4. Verify the body text correctly states 'You still have 6 days...'.
5. Verify the primary action 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' is highly prominent.
7. Verify the pop-up closes, the trial remains active, and the 'Remind me' toggle in the Trial Corner is now enabled.

expected_result: The pop-up displays correct, dynamic information and prominent actions. Clicking the primary action successfully sets the reminder and keeps the trial active.
